description_long: This house is nestled within a lush, landscaped environment featuring abundant trees, shrubs, and winding stone pathways. The structure itself is partially obscured by natural rock formations and dense foliage, giving it a secluded, integrated appearance. The house appears to be a single-story building with a flat or gently sloped roof, blending harmoniously with its surroundings. Large windows and a modest entryway are visible, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and outdoor views. The exterior is likely finished in neutral tones, complementing the earthy rocks and greenery. The overall design evokes a modern, nature-inspired architectural style with a strong connection to the landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house set within a landscaped garden, surrounded by rocks, trees, and winding paths, with large windows and a subtle entryway.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house is partially hidden by dense foliage and rock formations, with the landscaped garden and winding paths most prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rocky outcrops in the foreground, with the house and its entryway more visible in the background, framed by trees.
description_view_2: The winding stone paths and garden layout are clearly visible, with the house set back and partially obscured by rocks and vegetation.
description_view_3: The house is seen from behind a line of trees, with the roof and some windows visible, and the garden extending around the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryway with a single door, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or columns, blending into the landscape.
